author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

Title says it all, useful to track per detector region the number of auto-masked ROCs

#### PR validation:

Running locally:

```bash
getPayloadData.py \
    --plugin pluginSiPixelQuality_PayloadInspector \
    --plot plot_SiPixelQualityBadRocsTimeHistory_L1 \
    --tag SiPixelQuality_byPCL_stuckTBM_v1 \
    --input_params "{}" \
    --time_type Lumi \
    --iovs '{"start_iov": "1726748651684294", "end_iov": "1726748651684368"}' --db Prod \
    --test ;
```
returns:

```json
{
    "version": "1.0",
    "annotations": {
        "payload_type": "SiPixelQuality",
        "title": "bad ROCs count vs time (Layer 1)",
        "type": "TimeHistory",
        "x_label": "iov_since",
        "y_label": "bad ROCs count"
    },
    "data": [
        {
            "x": 7617996653531994944,
            "x_label": "402040 : 454",
            "y": 352,
            "y_err": 0
        },
        {
            "x": 7617997246237481792,
            "x_label": "402040 : 460",
            "y": 356,
            "y_err": 0
        },
        {
            "x": 7617997641374473024,
            "x_label": "402040 : 464",
            "y": 356,
            "y_err": 0
        },
        {
            "x": 7617999123138190144,
            "x_label": "402040 : 479",
            "y": 360,
            "y_err": 0
        },
        {
            "x": 7618002876939606848,
            "x_label": "402040 : 517",
            "y": 360,
            "y_err": 0
        },
        {
            "x": 7618003963566332736,
            "x_label": "402040 : 528",
            "y": 364,
            "y_err": 0
        }
    ]
}
```

N/A
title: `SiPixelQuality_PayloadInspector`: add per layer / disk bad ROC time history trends
